_invariant: Real Morpho exposure graph for USD0++ at the 2025-01-10 depeg. Built from on-chain reads (token address/decimals/totalSupply at block 21594532 via Alchemy archive) + the researcher's read-plan for the two coexisting Morpho oracle regimes. Two edges to USD0++/USDC Morpho Blue markets: one MARKET-price (Chainlink, depeg_sensitive=true — liquidations triggered) and one HARDCODED $1.00 (depeg_sensitive=false — oracle blind, no liquidation). LT=0.86 (86% LLTV) is the real Morpho liquidation line. The depeg price itself is injected per-case via peg_probes, not stored on the edge.

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy archive (USD0++ 0x35D8…9bC0 @ block 21594532, ts 2025-01-10T14:00:11Z, totalSupply 1.494B, decimals 18) + Morpho exposure from event post-mortems (Blockworks/Leviathan/ChainCatcher/Robdog)

measured_anchor._note: Re-anchor verification (2026-06-07): the depeg-trough anchor was confirmed ON-CHAIN. At block 21594531/21594532 the Chainlink USD0++/USD feed reads $0.90977632 (~9.0% off peg), the deepest in-window value (a fine scan 13:15→15:30 UTC bottomed at $0.909274 @block 21594980). Curve USD0/USD0++ pool cross-confirms get_dy(1->0)=0.9070 with balances 17.15M USD0 / 231.3M USD0++ (~7/93 imbalance, matching EVENT.md's ~92/8 drain). The press ~$0.89 low was a CEX/aggregator print; the on-chain protocol oracle NEVER fell below ~$0.909 anywhere in the Jan-9→Jan-14 window. The depeg price is injected per-case via peg_probes (now MEASURED, see label.draft.json); totalSupply/decimals/block/exposure-graph unchanged.
measured_anchor.fp_trap_recovery_unmeasurable: USD0++ NEVER re-pegged to ~par on-chain in any reachable block: Chainlink reads $0.9271 (2025-01-13) -> $0.9711 (2025-04-15) -> $0.9657 (2026-06-01 latest). The 0.997 FP-trap stays a synthetic asserted probe (measured=False).

metadata._note: Tokenized 4-year bond on USD0 (RWA/T-bill backed). $1 was a protocol-promise redemption, not a market float. 2025-01-09/10 Usual replaced implicit 1:1 redemption with a dual-exit model carrying an unconditional $0.87 floor -> market repriced toward the floor (on-chain Chainlink trough ~$0.909, ~9.0% off peg; press cited a ~$0.89 CEX low). Governance-induced revaluation, NOT a backing failure.
USD0++ was a major Morpho Blue collateral with $200m+ aggregate borrows across isolated markets at the time of the depeg.

meta.data_source: Market-price (Chainlink) USD0++/USDC Morpho market — the regime where the measured ~$0.909 on-chain price crossed the 86% LLTV and liquidations of looped positions actually triggered.

oracle.oracle_provider: Hardcoded $1.00 oracle (returns fixed 1.0, blind to market price)

meta.data_source: Hardcoded $1.00-oracle USD0++/USDC Morpho market — oracle blind to the depeg, so on-chain LLTV (86%) never breached and liquidations did NOT trigger (largest ~$500). Exposure was real; suppliers fled, borrow rates spiked. The dangerous blind-oracle regime.
